_: Public OpenTimestamps calendars used by ordpool's Stamp & Verify. Each entry is a calendar's base URI (we'll POST <uri>/digest to stamp and GET <uri>/timestamp/<commitment> to upgrade). Edit this file to add or remove calendars; PRs welcome. Verify the calendar is alive by hitting GET <uri>/ in a browser before adding -- a healthy calendar shows a 'Foxglove' or 'OpenTimestamps Calendar' banner. List audited 2026-05-09: see https://github.com/ordpool-space/ordpool/blob/main/PROTOCOL.md or the agent report in the commit history for evidence per calendar.
